t.EN: Automatically combusts Char Residue (the byproduct of biomass pyrolysis at the Chemical Refinery) and vents the resulting CO2 to atmosphere. No crew operation required — the reactor runs whenever char residue is in storage and sits idle when not. Build one next to your Chemical Refinery to handle the gas-byproduct side of pyrolysis.
Partially carbonized biomass exhaust waiting to be vented as CO2. Produced as a byproduct of pyrolysis. The reactor automatically vents it to atmosphere when in storage.
